column1: 先に謝るべきなのは、あなたの方だと思いますよ。
column2: さきにあやまるべきなのは、あなたのほうだとおもいますよ。
column3: I think you are the one who should apologize first.
column4: のは～の方だ (it is X that / X is the one who)
column6: contrastive focus: identifies X as the correct referent (not others); often corrects an assumption or redistributes responsibility
column8: のはXの方だ = contrastive focus (X, not others); のがXだ = neutral identification; こそ = emphatic focus marker (different construction)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:のはxの方だ source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top5k complexity:standard
